mapper.sql: mockexam_question_ref_id, mockexam_paper_ref_id, source_type, source_question_id, source_question_code, question_no_display, question_type, response_mode, stat_type, max_score, preview_text, status, remark, create_time, update_time, delete_flag
mapper.select: SELECT FROM mockexam_question_ref WHERE mockexam_question_ref_id = #{questionRefId} AND status = 1 AND delete_flag = '1' LIMIT 1
SELECT FROM mockexam_question_ref WHERE source_type = #{sourceType} AND source_question_id = #{sourceQuestionId} AND status = 1 AND delete_flag = '1' LIMIT 1
SELECT FROM mockexam_question_ref WHERE mockexam_paper_ref_id = #{paperRefId} AND status = 1 AND delete_flag = '1' ORDER BY mockexam_question_ref_id ASC
mapper.update: UPDATE mockexam_question_ref SET mockexam_paper_ref_id = #{mockexamPaperRefId}, source_type = #{sourceType}, source_question_id = #{sourceQuestionId}, source_question_code = #{sourceQuestionCode}, question_no_display = #{questionNoDisplay}, question_type = #{questionType}, response_mode = #{responseMode}, stat_type = #{statType}, max_score = #{maxScore}, preview_text = #{previewText}, status = #{status}, remark = #{remark}, update_time = #{updateTime}, delete_flag = #{deleteFlag} WHERE mockexam_question_ref_id = #{mockexamQuestionRefId}
UPDATE mockexam_question_ref SET status = #{status}, update_time = #{updateTime}, delete_flag = '1' WHERE mockexam_question_ref_id = #{questionRefId}
